description: A fixed-position button that scrolls the user back to the top of the page.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard back to top button with an upward chevron icon.

notes: All 26276 pages use an identical DOM structure with no variation in text or attributes. The aria-label 'Scroll to top of page' is hardcoded. The icon uses Font Awesome classes 'fas fa-angle-up fa-2x' with aria-hidden='true'. No props are needed — this is a fully static component. The related selector 'dd #my-pubs .backToTop' uses camelCase and appears inside a publications widget; it is a different element and not covered by this component.
